_description: Per-segment Apify actor configs. Sourcer reads this to know which actor to run + what search params to pass. Actor pricing is on their store page; keep an eye on the operator's $5/mo Apify credit budget.

shared_defaults._pricing_note: Full = $0.10 per search page (up to 25 profiles) + $0.004 per full profile. 100 leads ≈ $0.40. Well under $5/mo.
shared_defaults._max_items_reasoning: 3 segments × 34 = 102 leads. Slight over-run vs 100 target to allow for verification drop-off.

sme_agency_owners.search_query: Agency Owner OR Founder Agency OR Digital Agency Owner
sme_agency_owners._seniority_reasoning: 320 (Owner/Partner) + 220 (Director) — agency leaders sit in both buckets.

heads_of_product_ops.search_query: Head of Product OR VP Product OR Head of Operations OR Chief Product Officer

_cost_estimate_reasoning: 100 leads × $0.004/profile + 4 search pages × $0.10 = $0.80 USD ≈ €0.74. Budget headroom to €5.00 per month.
_prior_art_pass: 2026-07-14: confirmed harvestapi/linkedin-profile-search exists in the Apify store (6.3M+ runs, 4.8★, PAY_PER_EVENT). Also confirmed compass/crawler-google-places (30M+ runs) as a Google-Maps fallback for agency-owner segment. No LinkedIn cookie / auth required for this actor — bypasses Nick's grey-hat account-rental pattern entirely.
